channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Behind the Scenes of “The Young Girls of Rochefort” (1967)
item.description: “The Young Girls of Rochefort” (Les Demoiselles de Rochefort), directed by Jacques Demy in 1967, is a French musical comedy celebrated for its vibrant pastel colors, jazzy soundtrack, and homage to cl...

item.title: Federal Court Rules Coles Misled Shoppers with 'Down Down' Promotions
item.description: The Federal Court has found Coles guilty of misleading consumers over its 'Down Down' promotions, in a case brought by the Australian Competition and Consumer Commission (ACCC). Justice Michael O'Brya...

item.title: Tanzania Lutheran Church to adopt single constitution for stronger leadership
item.description: Di Evangelical Lutheran Church in Tanzania (ELCT) iko preparing for big changes as dem plan to bring one General Assembly before end of dis year to approve new constitution. Dis move follows decision ...

item.title: A Look at American Life in the Late 1940s Through Color Photography
item.description: Life in the United States during the late 1940s was marked by a mix of relief, optimism, and transformation as the country recovered from World War II. This period, known as the Post-War Boom, saw sig...

item.title: NBI Agents Suggest Senate Disturbance May Have Been Orchestrated
item.description: The recent commotion in the Philippine Senate has sparked debate over whether the incident was genuinely chaotic or deliberately staged. According to National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) Secretary M...

item.title: UK economy shows growth despite global tensions over Iran conflict
item.description: New data on the United Kingdom's economic performance has revealed that the economy experienced growth at a time of international tension surrounding the outbreak of conflict involving Iran. Despite e...

item.title: Nigeria and Rwanda to Strengthen Cooperation in Trade, Tourism, and Anti-Corruption
item.description: On Wednesday, President Bola Tinubu of Nigeria and President Paul Kagame of Rwanda meet for proper talks for Kigali during the Africa CEO Forum. Dem yan say make dem reactivate the Joint Permanent Min...

item.title: How Prospect Theory Influences Investment Decisions and Risk Management
item.description: Fisher Investments Canada discusses the relevance of prospect theory, first explored by psychologists Daniel Kahneman and Amos Tversky nearly 50 years ago, to modern investing. The theory explains hum...

item.title: ConCourt to Consider Legality of Magudumana's Extradition from Tanzania
item.description: The Constitutional Court of South Africa is set to hear Nandipha Magudumana's challenge regarding the legality of her extradition from Tanzania back to South Africa in April 2023. Magudumana was arres...

item.title: Vegetation Fire in Chino Hills Prompts Evacuations and Road Closures
item.description: On Wednesday evening, a vegetation fire ignited near Grand Avenue Park in Chino Hills around 7 p.m., prompting immediate evacuation orders for nearby residents. Within an hour, the fire had already co...

item.title: France Gall: From Yé-yé Teen Sensation to Iconic French Pop Artist
item.description: France Gall emerged as one of the most iconic figures of the French Yé-yé movement in the 1960s. She rose to fame as a teenager, captivating audiences with her clear, youthful voice and approachable c...

item.title: L.A. City Council Considers Delaying $30 Minimum Wage for Hospitality and Airport Workers
item.description: The Los Angeles City Council voted 9-6 to approve the initial step toward potentially delaying the $30 hourly minimum wage for hotel and airport workers, originally scheduled for 2028 in anticipation ...

item.title: Trump and Xi commence high-level summit in Beijing with formal welcome ceremony
item.description: US President Donald Trump has arrived in Beijing for a high-stakes summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping. The visit began with a formal welcome ceremony at the Great Hall of the People, which inclu...

item.title: PNP Confirms Equal Treatment for Bato dela Rosa Amid ICC Warrant
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) clarified on Thursday that Senator Ronald 'Bato' dela Rosa will not receive any special treatment following the issuance of an International Criminal Court (ICC) a...

item.title: Super Eagles Coach Chelle Recognised for Scouting Talents in Nigeria League
item.description: Chief Christopher Okonkwo, a respected football pundit for the State, don give big kudos to Super Eagles Coach Eric Chelle as e dey waka from one Naija Professional Football League ground go another d...

item.title: West Bengal government clears CBI to investigate corruption in recruitment scams
item.description: The West Bengal government on Wednesday granted the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) permission to prosecute state government officials accused of corruption, particularly in recruitment scams sp...

item.title: Varsho hits a decisive grand slam to secure Blue Jays win against Rays
item.description: In a dramatic 10th-inning showdown on Wednesday, Daulton Varsho delivered a clutch grand slam to propel the Toronto Blue Jays past the Tampa Bay Rays with a 5-3 victory. The win came at a critical mom...

item.title: Law Minister Clarifies No Move to Repeal 18th Amendment Amid Speculation
item.description: ISLAMABAD: State Minister for Law Barrister Aqeel Malik has clarified that there is no formal plan to reverse the 18th Constitutional Amendment, dismissing reports suggesting that a 28th Amendment cou...

item.title: Communities Urged to Support Those Affected by Severe Storms in Western and Eastern Cape
item.description: South Africans have witnessed severe storms wreak havoc across parts of the Western Cape and Eastern Cape, with destructive winds exceeding 110km/h causing widespread damage. Trucks, containers, and r...

item.title: A Glimpse Into Mid-19th Century Men's Fashion Through Vintage Photos
item.description: Menswear in the mid-19th century experienced a pivotal transformation, moving away from the flamboyant styles of the Romantic era toward a more structured and refined aesthetic. This period saw the fr...
